Title: CREATE PROCEDURE
Description: Note : To allow other users to call and execute a user-defined procedure, you must grant the other users (or PUBLIC) EXECUTE privilege for the procedure.
See also: COMMENT ON PROCEDURE , DECLARE , CALL , GRANT PRIVILEGES , DROP PROCEDURE , DROP ALL PROCEDURE .
Associated system table: sys.functions where type = 2 and language = 2.
Examples:
CREATE [ OR REPLACE ] PROCEDURE [
schema_name
'.' ]
procedure_name
'(' [
arg1_nm_type
[ ,
arg2_nm_type
] [, ... ] ] ')'
    BEGIN
procedure_body
END
